name: UpsertActivityPalette
description: Create/Update activities in the calendar via the .NET API

inputParameters.expression: (function(){ var a=$.activity||{};var now=new Date();var tomorrow=new Date(now.getTime()+86400000);tomorrow.setHours(9,0,0,0);if(!a.startDate)a.startDate=tomorrow.toISOString();var start=new Date(a.startDate);if(a.isAllDay===true){start.setHours(0,0,0,0);a.startDate=start.toISOString();}var end;if(a.endDate){end=new Date(a.endDate);}else{end=new Date(start.getTime()+3600000);}if(end<start){end=new Date(start.getTime()+3600000);}a.endDate=end.toISOString();return a; })()
